title: Maximum Subarray Sum After at Most K Swaps
description: Given an integer array nums and an integer k, perform at most k swap operations and then choose a non-empty contiguous subarray. In one swap operation, choose any two distinct array indices and exchange their current values; indices need not be adjacent, and indices or values may participate in more than one operation. You may use fewer than k swaps, including zero swaps. Return the maximum possible sum of the chosen non-empty contiguous subarray after the swaps.
input_contract: nums has length 1 to 1500 with values from -100000 to 100000; k is between 0 and len(nums).
output_contract: Return the maximum achievable non-empty subarray sum as an integer.
